# Divyam Tours

> Divyam Tours (Google Business Profile name: "Divyam tours & travels") is a local taxi and tour operator in Varanasi, India, run by founder and coordinator Mukesh. It provides private airport transfers, local sightseeing taxis, outstation cabs, customisable tour packages and tour-guide arrangement for both Indian and international travellers. Rated 4.9 stars across 257+ Google reviews. Booking is direct by phone or WhatsApp (+91 63927 77765); fares are confirmed in writing on WhatsApp before the trip, and there are no prices published on the site because every trip is quoted individually.

Varanasi is also known as Banaras, Benares and Kashi; Divyam Tours serves the whole city under all of these names, plus Sarnath and outstation destinations Prayagraj, Ayodhya, Bodhgaya, Vindhyachal, Chunar and Gaya.

Key facts:
- Founded: 2015. Based in Bhelupur, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh 221001, India.
- Languages: Hindi and English (coordinator); drivers speak Hindi and functional English.
- Vehicles: sedan (couples), SUV/MUV (families of 4 to 6), tempo traveller (groups of 7 to 12), luggage-friendly airport vehicles.
- Payment: cash, UPI, net banking. Fare agreed on WhatsApp before travel.
- Airport: Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport (VNS, Babatpur), about 22 km / 45 to 60 minutes from central Varanasi. Driver waits with a name board and tracks flights.

## Services

- [Taxi services overview](https://divyamtours.com/taxi-services/): all services, booking process, FAQs
- [Airport transfer](https://divyamtours.com/airport-transfer/): VNS airport pickup and drop
- [Local sightseeing](https://divyamtours.com/local-sightseeing/): half-day and full-day Varanasi plans, Kashi darshan circuit
- [Outstation taxi](https://divyamtours.com/outstation-taxi/): Prayagraj, Ayodhya, Bodhgaya, Vindhyachal
- [Tour packages](https://divyamtours.com/tour-packages/): one-day to five-day customisable plans
- [Tour guide](https://divyamtours.com/tour-guide/): guide alongside your taxi

## Routes

- [All routes](https://divyamtours.com/routes/): distance, duration and vehicle fit per route
- [Airport to city](https://divyamtours.com/routes/varanasi-airport-to-city-taxi/)
- [Varanasi to Sarnath](https://divyamtours.com/routes/varanasi-to-sarnath-taxi/)
- [Varanasi to Prayagraj](https://divyamtours.com/routes/varanasi-to-prayagraj-taxi/)
- [Varanasi to Ayodhya](https://divyamtours.com/routes/varanasi-to-ayodhya-taxi/)
- [Varanasi to Bodhgaya](https://divyamtours.com/routes/varanasi-to-bodhgaya-taxi/)

## Company

- [About](https://divyamtours.com/about/): who runs the service and how it operates
- [Reviews](https://divyamtours.com/reviews/): verbatim Google reviews
- [FAQ](https://divyamtours.com/faq/): booking, payment, vehicles, pacing
- [Contact](https://divyamtours.com/contact/): phone, WhatsApp, location
